title: Origins: Sandin
description: A Sand Elemental that wants to spread Sand Everywhere! All of this Origin's powers revolve around standing on top of or inside of Sand! (For Fabric, Requires Pehkui)
body:
# Sandin (updated for Minecraft version 1.20.2, Origins version 1.12.8) impact: 3, Icon: Sand, Requires Pehkui
_"You're a **Sand Elemental**. Equipped with powers that all revolve around **Sand**, you want to gather more! You even need it to breathe!"_

### "Sand Equals":
- **[+]** Everywhere where I have written **Sand**, I include these blocks.
- **[+] Sand, Red Sand, Any Colored Concrete Powder**

### "Are We One?"(Primary Active, Default keybind = G):
_"While on top of or inside of **Sand**, I can manipulate **Sand** from a distance!"_
- **[+]** While I am on top of or inside of **Sand:**
- **[+]** I can warp to any visible **Sand**
- **[+]** I can look at **Sand** to Select it
- **[+]** I can reach from inside **Selected Sand**
- `This allows me to reach much further away and build near it as if I was there myself!`
- **[+]** I can pull items near **Selected Sand** to me
- **[+]** I can pull mobs that are on top of **Selected Sand** to me
- **[+]** Mobs and Items on top of or inside **Sand** will glow for me

### "Living Dune"(Secondary Active Toggle, Default keybind = Unbound):
- **[+]** I can phase through **Sand** and all blocks that allow fluids to pass through them
- **[+]** I start with 12 Sand on me

### "Made of Falling Sand"(Passives):
- **[-]** I need to be on top of or inside of **Sand to Breathe!**
- **[+]** I sink in water
- **[+]** I break **Sand** faster
- **[+]** I take no fall damage from landing on **Sand!**

### "Sand Shaping"(Crafting Recipes):
_"I can uncraft **Sandstone Blocks** back into **Sand**"_
- **[+]** Examples:
- **Sandstone = 4 Sand**
- **Red Sandstone = 4 Red Sand**

### "No Legs or Feet"(Passives):
_"**Sand Elementals** like Myself don't have legs or feet, but We are still very agile!"_
- **[-]** I can't wear leggings, boots or an Elytra
  
_Origin by Frucs, very inspired by the Sandin race in [the game Dredgers](https://store.steampowered.com/app/1112930/Dredgers/), a very long time ago I asked and got Dredger's developer Pirate-Rob's permission to make this Origin_
